milestones.title: 1.0.1a — Hosted panels & operator settings
milestones.description: WT-003, WT-004, WT-006, WT-025 update notification

milestones.title: 1.0.3 — Live ops foundation
milestones.description: WT-024 — ops cache, live crashes, master refresh UX

milestones.title: 1.0.8 — Performance insights
milestones.description: WT-023 — L1 insights, busy/quiet, sticky lag, export

issues.title: Container metrics (bloom.host)
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.1a — Hosted panels & operator settings |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — memory/network look like host, not container |

**Problem:** `HostMetricsCollector` reads `/proc` from inside the container. On bloom.host and similar hosts, memory and network can reflect the **host** or cgroup limits inconsistently.

**Acceptance:** Detect bloom/Wings/Pterodactyl-style containers; prefer cgroup v2 memory limit + container network counters when available; label metrics "container" vs "host" in UI.

issues.title: False panel down (bloom.host)
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.1a |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — panel status erroneously down |

**Problem:** Auto panel detection may match Docker/Wings heuristics; panel daemon is not visible from inside the game container → `PANEL_DOWN` false positive.

**Workaround today:** `PANEL=none` in `watchtower/watchtower.conf`.

**Acceptance:** bloom.host profile; suppress panel-down when `PANEL=none` or hosted-container mode; document override in wiki/INSTALL.

issues.title: CPU display scale
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | open |
| **Roadmap** | Evaluate with 1.0.1a metrics work |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — aggregate 0–100% vs 0–800% on 8-core host |

**Problem:** Live CPU is normalized utilization (0–100%), not "sum of all cores" (e.g. 0–800% on 8 threads). Both are valid; preference varies.

**Acceptance:** Optional `CPU_DISPLAY_MODE=normalized|multicore` or show both core count + normalized with tooltip.

issues.title: TPS threshold in Settings UI
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.1a |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — Issues tab permanently warning on modded TPS |

**Problem:** `TPS_WARN` exists in `watchtower.conf` (default `19.5`) but **not** in dashboard Settings (only schedule / lookback / incremental). Heavy modpacks need ~17.5–18.0.

**Workaround today:** Edit `watchtower/watchtower.conf` → `TPS_WARN=17.5` (and `MSPT_WARN` if needed).

**Acceptance:** Settings API + Help expose `TPS_WARN` / `MSPT_WARN`; scorecard and Issues respect updated values without restart where possible.

issues.title: Mod classification false positives
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.12 |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — Create flagged as client; Xaero's hybrid confusion |

**Problem:** `ModSideScorer` uses static lists, TOML text, log attribution, and optional bytecode scan. Known pain points:

- **Create** in `UNCERTAIN_IDS` but still surfaces in client-mod suggestions when log noise hits Flywheel/Ponder.
- **Ponder** in `LIKELY_REMOVABLE_IDS` but required by Create ecosystem on server.
- **Xaero's** — client-heavy jars with optional server components.
- Fuzzy log attribution can blame the wrong mod id.

**Workaround today:** Per-mod ignore in Mods tab (`client_mod_ignores`).

**Acceptance:** Fewer false "remove from server" suggestions for server-required gameplay mods; hybrid mods land in `uncertain` / `test_remove` with clear copy, not `likely_removable`.

**Related:** WT-008, WT-010

issues.title: Two-layer mod side scoring
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.12 |
| **Source** | Design — local heuristics + Modrinth validation |

**Problem:** Local-only scoring cannot authoritatively resolve long-tail mods; static lists require constant maintenance.

**Design:** Layer 1 (local ModSideScorer) → Layer 2 optional Modrinth API (SHA-512 hash lookup) → combined score in facts JSON.

**Acceptance:** `MODRINTH_LOOKUP=true` in `watchtower.conf`; cache in `watchtower/modrinth-cache.json`; DR/offline skips network; UI shows signal e.g. `modrinth:server_required`.

**Related:** WT-011, WT-007

issues.title: Mod dependency tree UI
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.12 |
| **Source** | Design — dependency tree when evaluating removals |

**Problem:** `ModDependencyGraph` exists in core but dashboard only shows flat `dependents[]` on flagged mods. Operators cannot see why a mod is protected or what breaks if removed.

**Acceptance:** Mods tab expandable tree (required / optional / embedded deps from `mods.toml`); highlight nodes implicated in client-mod scoring; DR viewer parity for offline facts.

issues.title: Server-required allowlist
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.12 |
| **Source** | Mod classification review |

**Problem:** No `SERVER_REQUIRED_IDS` denylist for "never flag as client-only." Create ecosystem and common gameplay mods need hard guards independent of network.

**Acceptance:** `SERVER_REQUIRED_IDS` (create, flywheel, …); Ponder removed from `LIKELY_REMOVABLE_IDS` or gated when Create present; dependents of server-required mods inherit protection.

issues.title: Modrinth opt-in network
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.12 |
| **Source** | Design — privacy / "no cloud" positioning |

**Problem:** Modrinth calls send jar hashes or slugs off-box; must not run by default.

**Acceptance:** `MODRINTH_LOOKUP=false` default; `MODRINTH_LOOKUP_ON_REPORT=true` optional; rate-limit + cache; disclose in docs; skip in `report_mode: dr`.

issues.title: Group similar watchdog crashes
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.13 |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — most crashes are "server thread stopped responding" |

**Problem:** Each watchdog stall is a separate Crashes row; no fingerprint grouping by stall duration / MSPT context / repeat count.

**Acceptance:** Crashes tab groups `ServerHangWatchdog` (and similar) by signature; show count + first/last seen; expand for individual files.

issues.title: Mark all crashes reviewed
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.13 |
| **Source** | Tester feedback |

**Problem:** Only per-crash acknowledge exists; long watchdog runs clutter Issues/Crashes badges.

**Acceptance:** Bulk acknowledge API endpoint; dashboard button "Mark all reviewed"; persists in state like single acks.

issues.title: External backups unusable
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | shipped |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.10 – 1.0.10.3 |
| **Source** | Tester feedback — bloom.host stores backups outside container |

**Shipped:** Panel backup marker file + webhook (`BACKUP_WEBHOOK_TOKEN`); `optional.backup_external` on facts; suppress false `BACKUP_NOT_FOUND` when signal is fresh. Dashboard setup in **Settings → Backups** (2-step fast track as of 1.0.10.3).

issues.title: Crash reports misclassified as unknown
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md#1013--better-crash-and-dr-advice) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.13 — Crash intelligence v2 |
| **Source** | Crash corpus study — 147 local crash reports |

**Problem:** ~35% of crashes classify as `unknown` despite clear stacks; DR can blame wrong mod on watchdog stalls.

**Acceptance:** `unknown` <10% on corpus; correct narratives + DR parity; session-gated mod errors; reference DR bundle 2026-06-20 fixture.

**Related:** WT-012/WT-013 ship in 1.0.14 after fingerprints exist.

issues.title: Performance insights from saved live data
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md#108--performance-insights) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.8 — Performance insights (L1 prerequisite 1.0.2) |
| **Source** | MYTH server admin feedback — use saved live history instead of Plan or another agent |

**Problem:** Watchtower saves long-term live metrics but operators must interpret sparklines manually or run other tools for busy/quiet hours, performance-vs-player outliers, and sticky lag (MSPT stays high after players leave). Activity tab shows report events, not performance patterns.

**Acceptance:** Busy/quiet hours on Overview; outlier minutes with timestamp + players + MSPT + mem; sticky lag on synthetic fixture; CSV export via `/api/performance/export`; Help clarifies Activity vs Overview insights. L1 rollups + `mem_used_gb_avg` in 1.0.2.

issues.title: Live ops dashboard — tabs without full report
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md#planned-releases-1021014) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.3 (crashes) → 1.0.4 (Activity + poll) → 1.0.6 (mod peek) → 1.0.11 (read paths) → 1.0.14 (inbox) |
| **Source** | Operator UX — dashboard should feel live; report = master audit |

**Problem:** Crashes, Mods, Activity, Issues mostly read last L3 facts until Run report. Live tab and backup rescan already work.

**Acceptance:** L2.5 ops cache; live scan APIs; session-gated poll (1.0.4); Issues peek not full engine; master report reconciles cache; inbox in 1.0.14.

issues.title: Update available notification (not auto-update)
issues.body:
**Links:** [Roadmap](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md#coming-next--version-101a) · [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/djinnbanter/WatchTower/issues)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Status** | planned |
| **Roadmap** | 1.0.1a |
| **Source** | Maintainer / operator UX — frequent 1.0.x patches |

**Problem:** No in-dashboard signal when a newer Watchtower exists on GitHub/Modrinth. JAR replace always requires restart.

**Acceptance:** Banner when latest > current; links to GitHub Releases + Modrinth; copy for both JARs + restart; UPDATE_CHECK=false disables; no auto-download.
